response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks focused, recent experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — his current work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no clear evidence of deep JVM or IDE subsystem development.
strengths: Demonstrated versatility across languages and platforms, including Java in past roles
Strong open-source contributions and tooling experience (e.g., test runners, GIS platform)
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and public talks on technical topics
concerns: No recent or prominent experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or JVM-based IDE tooling
Current focus is on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not Java/Kotlin enterprise ecosystems
Lacks explicit evidence of working on IDE internals, language servers, or build tool integrations
